channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The best Dyson EOFY 2026 deals in Australia: save over AU$650 on top-selling vacuums, hair stylers and fans
item.description: Dyson is hosting its own EOFY sale this year, with up to AU$651 off select products, but other retailers are also vying for your attention.

item.title: watchOS 27 may have improved the Apple Watch's AI features, but a Siri AI health coach was needed to rival the Google Fitbit Air
item.description: Sorry, Apple: I don't want to read reams of information about stretching on a 2-inch screen.

item.title: Instagram finally lets you reorder posts on your grid
item.description: You can now rearrange posts on Instagram the way you want to.

item.title: Mark your calendars — Amazon has finally revealed the Australian dates for its 2026 Prime Day sale
item.description: Amazon Australia has quietly announced that Prime Day 2026 in Australia will take place in early July, and we're expecting even better discounts than what we saw recently during its Mid-Year sale.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for June 9, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for June 9, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for June 9, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1816 on June 9 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: I've covered EOFY sales for 10 years — these are 60+ tax-time tech deals I recommend right now
item.description: Don't fret if you missed out on Amazon's Mid-Year Sale because all other retailers and brands are offering discounts for their own EOFY sales. Shop laptops, headphones, cameras and more this June.
